summary: Completed comprehensive navigation testing on HARNESS Project website. All navigation functionality is working correctly across desktop and mobile viewports on all tested pages (index.html, about.html, toolkit.html, contact.html).

minor_issues.issue: Minor timeout when closing mobile menu on contact.html due to element interception
minor_issues.impact: Menu opens correctly, closing works but may require multiple attempts

passed_tests: Desktop navigation links are visible and clickable
Hamburger menu properly hidden on desktop
Mobile navigation responsive design works correctly
Hamburger menu visible and functional on mobile
Mobile menu opens with proper animation and overlay
Mobile navigation links are present and clickable
Universal-loader.js successfully loads navigation on all pages
Mobile menu closes properly (with minor exception on contact page)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvement: Consider adding force=true to mobile menu close click handler to prevent element interception timeouts, but overall navigation is fully functional.
